title: Green Access Partners V.C. backs Cryptool ahead of launch
content_html:
Green Access Partners V.C. has come on board as a strategic backer of Cryptool.

The deal brings three things at once: capital that extends the runway through launch, operator-level guidance from a team with deep crypto investment experience, and direct access to a wider investor network for the projects that will fundraise on the platform.

The choice of partner reflects how the team thinks about crypto investment management in the first place: long-term, transparent, and built for funds that need real accountability.
author: Cryptool
